{{ref}}
§ 01Thank You

Thank you for referring {{prospectName}} at {{companyName}} to Forhemit. We appreciate your trust and confidence in our work, and we take every referral seriously.

A strong referral is the highest compliment we can receive, and we are committed to providing the same level of care and attention you would expect.

§ 02What Happens Next

Here is what you can expect from us:

1.Initial outreach. We will reach out to {{prospectName}} within 48 hours to introduce Forhemit and schedule an introductory call.
2.Qualification. We will conduct a brief qualification to determine whether an ESOP transition is a fit for their situation, timeline, and goals.
3.Progress update. We will keep you informed of our progress at each stage. You will know whether the conversation moves forward, and when.
§ 03Referral Fee

As a reminder, if the referred transaction closes, a referral fee of {{referralFeePct}} of the deal value is payable in accordance with our referral agreement.

Note: Referral fees are paid only upon successful closing. There is no cost or obligation to you or the prospect for the initial evaluation.
§ 04Confidentiality

All information you have shared with us regarding {{prospectName}} and {{companyName}} will be kept strictly confidential. We will not disclose the source of the referral without your prior consent.

§ 05Stay Connected

We value our relationship and welcome future referrals at any time. If you know other business owners who may benefit from an ESOP transition, please do not hesitate to connect us.
